name: vLLM Qwen3.5-27B (ROCm gfx1151)
description: Phase 3 daily-driver upgrade — Qwen3.5-27B BF16 (Feb 2026 release, ~54GB resident vs 64GB for Qwen3-32B). Served via vLLM-ROCm on AMD Strix Halo (gfx1151). Initially deployed on staging port :8012 alongside legacy :8002 (Qwen3-32B); flip via models.json baseUrl, then retire :8002. Automatic rollback on 4 thresholds per plan §3c.
